creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks. Landed.

VULKAN is disabled by default in ffmpeg4 unlike ffmpeg >= 6 due to missing many features, fewer filters, no libplacebo support and inadequate runtime QA. See bug 275360 for an easy way to test compared to crafting long CLI lines when using filters.

(In reply to Travis Hunter from comment #3)
> This probably should go upstream as well, but is ffmpeg4 maintained anymore?

Probably maintained due to being offered in https://ffmpeg.org/download.html#release_4.4 unlike https://ffmpeg.org/olddownload.html Looking at https://github.com/ffmpeg/ffmpeg/commits/release/4.4 it mainly contains cherry-picks or security-related fixes.
